message:
test(proptest): expand recorder_query from 13 to 24 property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 11 new property tests covering serde roundtrips and invariants for
RecorderQueryRequest, TimeRange, QueryEventKind, and QueryStats, plus
required_tier logic (metadata→A0, cross-pane→A2, text search→A2).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
